goals: Expose the current headless runtime as a manager/portfolio/governance-aware contract.
Make runtime-v2 the sole runtime contract published by the current repository.
Let agent and CLI clients consume governance-native fields and ignore unknown diagnostic payloads.

compatibility.contract_versioning_strategy: Canonical contract version is runtime-v2 at /api/contracts/runtime-v2.
compatibility.unknown_fields_policy: Agent and CLI clients must ignore unknown object fields.
compatibility.nullable_fields_policy: Missing and null should be treated equivalently unless explicitly required.
compatibility.error_normalization_recommendation: Client SDK should normalize flat {error} and {status,error} bodies into one client-side error type.

cross_domain_feedback_fragment.description: Commander bounded workflows and ask_stock responses expose a shared feedback fragment for user-readable gate/audit summaries.

flatError.description: Most current endpoints return a flat error body on non-2xx.

statusError.description: Config mutation endpoints may return a status-bearing error body.

runtimeStatus.description: Commander runtime snapshot. Frontend should rely on documented top-level sections and ignore unknown fields inside nested diagnostic objects.

trainingExecution.description: Result of executing a training plan.

dataSourceUnavailableError.description: Structured 503 payload returned when live training data could not be resolved and mock mode was not explicitly enabled.

responseFeedback.description: Standard cross-domain feedback fragment returned by Commander-backed workflows and stock-analysis responses.

responseNextAction.description: Standard cross-domain next-action fragment derived from feedback and gate state.

responseEnvelope.description: Unified response envelope for Commander natural-language and bounded workflow responses.

protocol.resume_behavior: best-effort only; client should reconnect and refresh status if history gaps occur

endpoints.summary: Fetch the frozen runtime API contract document.
notes: Primary handoff contract for API, CLI, and agent clients.

endpoints.summary: Fetch the JSON Schema derivative for the frozen runtime API contract.
notes: Safe to call before runtime initialization.

endpoints.summary: Fetch the OpenAPI derivative for the frozen runtime API contract.
notes: Safe to call before runtime initialization.

endpoints.summary: Get a runtime snapshot with configurable detail.
notes: Use GET /api/status as the canonical runtime status bootstrap.
Stateless deploys may return a state-backed snapshot when live runtime is absent.

endpoints.summary: Subscribe to server-sent training/runtime events.
notes: Initial event is `connected`.
Keepalive comments are emitted when idle.

endpoints.summary: Return a pollable recent-event summary with optional human-readable rendering.

cases: view must be one of: json, human

notes: Suitable for polling when SSE consumption is unnecessary.
Stateless deploys may summarize persisted event logs without live runtime.
JSON responses also include `human_reply` and `display` fields for agent or human relay.

endpoints.summary: Send a natural-language message to Commander.

cases: Commander runtime is not initialized or background loop is unavailable.

notes: Provide session_key/chat_id to continue a multi-turn API conversation; omit them for isolated one-shot requests.

endpoints.summary: Open a session-bound SSE stream for runtime events plus the final Commander reply.

cases: Commander runtime is not initialized or background loop is unavailable.

notes: Event sequence is `connected` -> repeated `runtime_event` -> `summary` -> `reply` -> `done`.
If the request fails after the stream is opened, `summary` is followed by `error` instead of `reply` and `done`.
The `runtime_event` payload contains phase labels, risk hints, confirmation state, artifacts, and human relay text.
This is event streaming for runtime state; it does not stream LLM tokens.

endpoints.summary: Create a structured training plan artifact without executing it.

cases: detail_mode must be one of: fast, slow
tags must be a list of strings or a comma-separated string
Commander runtime is not initialized or background loop is unavailable.

notes: Requires live runtime for plan synthesis; stateless deploys do not provide a create fallback.

endpoints.summary: List latest training plan artifacts.
notes: Stateless deploys may list persisted training plan artifacts without live runtime.

endpoints.summary: Fetch a single training plan artifact.
notes: Stateless deploys may read persisted training plan artifacts without live runtime.

endpoints.summary: Execute a persisted training plan.

cases: Training plan execution failed before the first cycle because no live data source was available.
Commander runtime is not initialized or background loop is unavailable.

notes: Requires live runtime and background loop to execute persisted plans; stateless deploys do not provide an execute fallback.

endpoints.summary: List latest training run artifacts.
notes: Stateless deploys may list persisted training run artifacts without live runtime.

endpoints.summary: Fetch a single training run artifact.
notes: Stateless deploys may read persisted training run artifacts without live runtime.

endpoints.summary: List latest training evaluation artifacts.
notes: Stateless deploys may list persisted training evaluation artifacts without live runtime.

endpoints.summary: Fetch a single training evaluation artifact.
notes: Stateless deploys may read persisted training evaluation artifacts without live runtime.

endpoints.summary: List persisted agent prompt records.
notes: Falls back to persisted agent prompt registry when live runtime is absent.

endpoints.summary: Persist system_prompt changes for one agent.
notes: Persists agent prompt overrides even when live runtime is absent; live prompt refresh only occurs when runtime is present.

endpoints.summary: Read editable runtime artifact paths.
notes: Falls back to persisted runtime path config when live runtime is absent.
Runtime availability remains an endpoint-level contract concern and is not exposed as a runtime_paths config field.

endpoints.summary: Update runtime artifact paths without changing CLI usage.

cases: runtime_paths public API only accepts training_output_dir and artifact_log_dir; config audit/snapshot paths are internal runtime details

notes: Persists runtime path config even when live runtime is absent; live path sync only occurs when runtime is present.
Fallback/runtime semantics are conveyed by endpoint contract and behavior rather than a runtime_paths payload flag.

endpoints.summary: Read evolution training/runtime configuration.
notes: Falls back to persisted evolution config layers when live runtime is absent.
Public response excludes config layer paths, runtime override paths, audit/snapshot locations, and compat/runtime metadata.

endpoints.summary: Patch editable evolution training/runtime configuration.

request_body.description: Only editable training/runtime keys are applied; LLM keys are rejected and must go through /api/control_plane.

web_api_require_auth.description: Whether API authentication is required for non-public endpoints.

web_api_public_read_enabled.description: Whether selected read-only API endpoints may remain public when auth is enabled.

cases: Validation error for editable config keys.

notes: Security: provider/model/api_key ownership lives in /api/control_plane plus config/control_plane.yaml and config/control_plane.local.yaml; any returned api_key remains masked.
Web UI has been removed; agent and CLI workflows should use API, SSE and commander entrypoints.
Public response excludes config layer paths, runtime override paths, audit/snapshot locations, and compat/runtime metadata.
Persists evolution config even when live runtime is absent; live refresh only occurs when runtime is present.

endpoints.summary: Read canonical control-plane bindings, governance resolution, and masked secret status.
notes: Returned api_key values remain masked; ownership lives in config/control_plane.yaml and config/control_plane.local.yaml.
Public response does not expose local config/audit/snapshot file paths.
Falls back to persisted control-plane config when live runtime is absent.

endpoints.summary: Patch canonical control-plane bindings and persist secrets into local override storage.

request_body.description: Public patch payload for control-plane provider, model, binding, and runtime data-policy ownership.

cases: request body must be a JSON object
Public control-plane patch only accepts llm.providers / llm.models / llm.bindings / data.runtime_policy.

notes: Writes are persisted through control-plane services; masked api_key values do not round-trip from the public payload.
Public write contract rejects config metadata, audit/snapshot paths, and runtime-only helper fields.
Persists control-plane bindings even when live runtime is absent; global effect still requires restart.

endpoints.summary: Read canonical market-data repository summary and quality audit.
notes: Falls back to canonical market data repository status when live runtime is absent.

endpoints.summary: Kick off background sync for security master, daily bars, and index bars.
notes: Returns immediately; progress must be inferred from logs or refreshed data status.
When live runtime is present, confirm=false may return a confirmation workflow; stateless fallback starts a best-effort local background worker.

feedback.summary: 当前任务已完成，计划与参数覆盖满足预期。
当前任务已完成，计划与参数覆盖满足预期。

strategy.name: chan_theory
analysis_steps: 结合最新价格输出结论

feedback.summary: 当前任务仍需人工确认后才能视为审计闭环完成。
当前任务已完成，计划与参数覆盖满足预期。
